General.Name: Loco Hong Kong Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Loco Hong Kong Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, trades in metal in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and Singapore. It operates through Trading of Metal, Money Lending Services, and Education Management Services segments. The Trading of Metal segment offers standard metals, such as copper, aluminum, nickel, and metal parts; metal consumer goods components; and bulk commodities, such as copper concentrates, iron ore, and ferronickel. Its Education Management Services segment provides education management and consulting services to educational institutions, and educational textbook and book distributors. The Money Lending Services segment offers credit services to enterprises and individuals. It is also involved in silver processing activities. Loco Hong Kong Holdings Limited was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
